e404.title: 404. Page Not Found.
e404.descr: The page you're looking for can't be found. Check the URL and try again.

e403.title: 403. Forbidden.
e403.descr: Sorry, but you don't have permission to access this page.You can do something :)

e500.title: 500. Internal Server Error.
e500.descr: We are working towards creating something better. Won't be long...
